# Risky-file allowlist for claude-pr-loop.yml
#
# Lines are shell glob patterns (case-sensitive). One pattern per line.
# Lines starting with '#' or empty lines are ignored.
#
# A PR touching ANY file matching ANY pattern below = "risky"
#   → human review required, no auto-merge
#
# Anything not matched = "low-risk"
#   → auto-merge once CI is green
#
# When in doubt, ADD a pattern. Easier to widen than narrow after a regrettable auto-merge.
# Keep this file conservative — if you don't know whether a file is risky, treat it as risky.

# Billing surface — Stripe, prices, webhooks
app/api/stripe/**

# Auth + subscription gates — security boundary
lib/auth-server.ts
lib/subscription.ts
middleware.ts

# Database schema — DROPs and migrations are irreversible
supabase/**
prisma/**

# Build + runtime config
next.config.ts
next.config.js
next.config.mjs
vercel.json
vercel.ts

# Dependencies — transitive bumps can break prod silently
package.json
package-lock.json
npm-shrinkwrap.json

# CI/CD — workflow rewrite must be reviewed by hand
.github/workflows/**

# Project rules — instructions agents follow
AGENTS.md
CLAUDE.md
.github/prompts/risky-allowlist.txt

# Owner notification surface — wrong values silently break alerts
scripts/notify-pr-opened.ts

# Public env contract — NEXT_PUBLIC_* changes ship to all browsers
.env.example
